description: <b>Style Note</b> Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from locomotive. The Fit enhances your figure while the look oozes easy charm. Team this with jeans and sports shoes on a day out with friends or with leather shoes and a cool jacket for an evening date to create an excellent impression.  <b>Product Details</b> Blue and grey check shirt, has a slim spread collar, full buttoned placket, buttoned tabs on the shoulder, back yoke, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, mid arm button tab, patch pocket on the left chest with branding above it, branding above the hemline and curved hemline <b>Material and Care</b> 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach Tumble dry normal Use warm iron <b>Size and Fit</b> Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M <b>Style Note</b>Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from Locomotive.
